summary: Full frontend regression of House Health F4.3 (Stripe Checkout subscription flow). 6/7 specified tests executed (skipped HouseHealthCard locked CTA since seeded client has active premium sub per brief). All upgrade-page + Stripe redirect + success fallback + admin price edit + price propagation flows PASS.

issues: Overlay banner sticks at bottom across /house-health/upgrade and /house-health/upgrade/success — does not block clicks but partially obscures the bottom 'Plată securizată via Stripe' info panel. Acknowledged in prior iterations.

critical_code_review_comments: HouseHealthUpgradePage.jsx success-poll: when the very first GET /checkout-status returns a non-success/expired payload (e.g. backend returns 404 'Sesiunea de plată nu există.'), code enters catch branch and sets phase='error' immediately — no retry. That is reasonable behaviour for hard 404s, but the CTA label still reads 'Înapoi' (correct), so OK.
subscribe() shows generic 'Stripe nu a returnat URL.' if r.data.url is falsy but does not log/track the response — fine for current Stripe sandbox.
Stripe redirect was confirmed real (cs_test_a1HzKZJxxp6g... URL on checkout.stripe.com) — the sk_test_emergent key is functional for session creation (option-b auto-provision worked).
test_credentials: admin@propmanage.io / 1!nasov01ADMIN, client@propmanage.io / Client123!, specialist@propmanage.io / Spec123!. NOTE: /app/memory/test_credentials.md still lists Admin123! for admin which does NOT work — only 1!nasov01ADMIN works. Recommend the main agent updates that file.
seed_data_creation: Edited 'basic' plan price 9→12 via admin UI, verified propagation to /house-health/upgrade for client, then restored back to 9.0 via authenticated PATCH /api/admin/house-health/plans/{id} (sandbox left clean).
context_for_next_testing_agent: F4.3 fully validated. Stripe redirect works with sk_test_emergent (auto-provisioning Price IDs in option-b mode). The /api/house-health/checkout-status/{sid} endpoint returns 404 detail 'Sesiunea de plată nu există.' for unknown sessions and the React success page handles that gracefully via the catch branch (phase=error). The admin PATCH endpoint is /api/admin/house-health/plans/{id} (NOT /api/house-health/admin/plans/{id}). client@propmanage.io has an active premium sub so the lock_sub state on HouseHealthCard CTA cannot be tested directly — to validate the redirect (Activează abonament → /house-health/upgrade) you must use a fresh client account or expire the sub in Mongo (not done here).
verified_flows: Client login + GET /house-health/upgrade renders with H1 'Activează House Health' in Romanian
Three plan cards rendered with data-testid hh-plan-card-{basic,pro,premium}
Pro card shows 'Recomandat' featured badge (data-testid hh-plan-card-pro highlighted with emerald gradient + Sparkles icon)
Each card shows: slug badge, name, description, price+€/lună, trial days badge (7/14/14), feature list (data-testid hh-plan-features-{slug}), lead commission % (10/10/5), 'Activează acum' button
Click 'Activează acum' on basic → POST /api/house-health/checkout-session returns Stripe URL → browser redirected to https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_a1HzKZJ... (verified live)
Frontend POST body sent: {plan_slug:'basic', origin_url:'https://phased-document.preview.emergentagent.com'} — origin_url derived from window.location.origin, NOT hardcoded

/house-health/upgrade/success?session_id=invalid_test_xyz → polls, backend returns 404 'Sesiunea de plată nu există.' → UI gracefully shows AlertCircle + 'Atenție' + Romanian error message + 'Înapoi' CTA — no 500 crash, no react error boundary

Admin login + /admin/house-health → Planuri tab shows 9 plans (3 seeded basic/pro/premium + previously created QA fixtures from iteration 66) — each with slug badge, price, billing freq, trial days, lead commission, features

Admin edit Basic plan: opened form with all fields populated (slug locked='basic', name='Basic', desc, price=9, freq=Lunar, trial=7, lead=10, features) → changed price to 12 → Salvează → list now shows '12 EUR / lună' on Basic row
Client /house-health/upgrade reloaded → Basic card now displays '12€ / lună' (verified text content) — confirms admin edits propagate to public picker in real time
Restored Basic price 12→9 via PATCH /api/admin/house-health/plans/{id} (test data cleaned up)
skipped_per_brief: HouseHealthCard locked_sub CTA → /house-health/upgrade redirect (client has active premium sub; brief allows skipping)
Existing F1-F4.2 regression flows (covered exhaustively in iteration_66; no code changes here that would affect them)
